item: GAP 1 — Novoton facilities NOT in travel_api_alias
details: Novoton's 31 facility IDs have no aliases in travel_api_alias. They bypass travel_core entirely and go through hotel_feature_mappings

item: GAP 2 — No canonical code mapping for Novoton facilities
details: Novoton facility IDs (from API) are stored as-is in hotel_feature_mappings.provider_code without mapping to canonical codes like 'pool' or 'wifi'
Novoton splits facilities into 4 types (hotel_facility/room_facility/travel_group/beach_access). Sphinx uses single 'facility' type with per-code cscart_feature_id
Same physical amenity (e.g. WiFi) has different IDs in each provider with no linkage between them

item: GAP 5 — family_friendly not used by Novoton
details: travel_core has canonical code 'family_friendly' and Sphinx seeds alias. Novoton does not use it

item: GAP 6 — Novoton facility_type classification is manual
details: Admin must manually reclassify facilities from default 'hotel_facility' to room_facility/travel_group/beach_access
